.. _symbol:

symbol
======

|              |              |*unique*      |True          |
+--------------+--------------+--------------+--------------+

|**s**         |18            |              |              |

|              |              |*alias*       |size          |
+--------------+--------------+--------------+--------------+
|              |              |*unique*      |True          |
